passive.name: Runic Blade
passive.description: Riven's abilities charge her blade, and her basic attacks expend charges to deal an additional damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Riven}} [[champion ability|ability]] casts generate stacks of ''Charge'', which stacks up to a cap. '''Riven's''' basic attacks consume a stack to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Riven's''' [[champion ability|ability]] casts generate a [[stack]] of ''Charge'' for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts and stacking up to 3 times. '''Riven's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to each consume a stack to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} equal to {{as|{{pp|key=%|30 to 50|formula=30% + 1.17647% per level}} AD}}, reduced to{{ft|50%|{{as|{{pp|key=%|15 to 25|formula=15% + 0.588235% per level}} AD}}}}against [[structure]]s.
wiki_detail.description2: The '''bonus''' damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers and {{tip|applies lifesteal|applies}} {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* ''Runic Blade's'' duration also refreshes when '''Riven''' consumes a stack.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[ward]]s.
* The number of empowered attacks available is represented by a counter under her [[health bar]], only visible to the player,

Q.name: Broken Wings
Q.description: Riven lashes out in a series of strikes. This ability can be reactivated three times in a short time frame with the third hit knocking back nearby enemies.
Q.tooltip:
Riven dashes forward, dealing {{ firstslashdamage }} physical damage. She can Recast this Ability twice. The first Recast is the same as the original, but the second has a different effect:

Recast: Riven leaps forward and slams, dealing {{ firstslashdamage }} physical damage and Knocks Up nearby enemies for 0.75 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Riven}} can cast this ability up to three times in quick succession, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
* {{sbc|First Cast:}} '''Riven''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} forward and slashes her sword in a circle.
* {{sbc|Second Cast:}} '''Riven''' mimics the first cast.
* {{sbc|Third Cast:}} '''Riven''' mimics the first cast's dash, but now slams her sword in a larger circle, briefly {{tip|airborne|knocking back}} enemies hit as well.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Riven''' can activate ''Broken Wings'' three times before the ability goes on cooldown, with a {{fd|0.3125}}-second {{tt|static cooldown|Unaffected by ability haste}} between casts. If '''Riven''' does not recast the ability within 4 seconds of the previous cast, it goes on cooldown.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Riven''' slashes with her sword for each of the three casts, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies struck within an area, {{tip|Basic attack reset|resetting}} her basic attack timer, and ordering her to basic attack the target of ''Broken Wings'' if there are any.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|45 to 165}} {{as|(+ {{ap|65 to 85}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|45*3 to 165*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|65*3 to 85*3}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|First Cast:}} '''Riven''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} up to 225 units towards the target enemy or in the direction she is currently facing, striking enemies in the target area 100 units away. This cast cannot cross terrain.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Second Cast:}} '''Riven''' mimics the first cast's effects.
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Third Cast:}} '''Riven''' mimics the first cast's effects in a larger area while also {{tip|airborne|knocking back}} enemies hit 75 units over {{fd|0.5}} seconds. This cast can cross terrain.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|{{fd|150}}|Standard first cast's radius}} / {{tt|250|Standard final cast's radius}} / {{tt|{{fd|200}}|Enhanced first cast's radius}} / {{tt|300|Enhanced final cast's radius}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Each cast counts as a single ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* The basic attack reset is not considered one for {{ri|Hail of Blades}}.
* Moving after using ''Broken Wings'' allows Riven to do other actions faster.
* The {{sbc|Third Cast}} prevents '''Riven''' from using basic attacks and abilities for longer than the other 2 casts.
* The {{sbc|Third Cast}} may have an extended dash range when crossing terrain.

W.name: Ki Burst
W.description: Riven emits a Ki Burst, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.
W.tooltip: Riven's sword emits a burst of runic energy, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and Stunning for {{ e5 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} Riven emits a flash of runic energy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|stun|stunning}} nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Riven''' emits a flash of runic energy before the cast time, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes: * '''Riven''' is briefly unable to basic attack after the cast time.

E.name: Valor
E.description: Riven steps forward a short distance and blocks incoming damage.
E.tooltip: Riven quickly dashes and gains {{ totalshield }} Shield for 1.5 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Riven}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} in the target direction and gains a brief {{tip|shield}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Riven''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} in the target direction, though not through terrain, while granting herself a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Riven''' can cast any of her abilities during the dash. Valor will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes: * {{ai|Q|Riven}} may be cast during {{ai|W|Riven}} or {{ai|R|Riven}} cast times if they're used at the end or briefly after the dash.{{bug|1}}

R.name: Blade of the Exile
R.description: Riven empowers her keepsake weapon with energy, and gains Attack Damage and Range. During this time, she also gains the ability to use Wind Slash, a powerful ranged attack, once.
R.tooltip:
Riven's weapon surges with spiritual energy, granting her {{ bonusad }} Attack Damage and increased range on damaging Abilities and Attacks for {{ duration }} seconds. While active, she can Recast.

Recast: Riven fires a wind slash that deals between {{ mindamage }} and {{ maxdamage }} physical damage, based on their missing Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Riven}} empowers her blade for some time, gaining {{sti|ad|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and increased {{sti|range}} on her {{tip|basic attacks}}, ''{{ai|Broken Wings|Riven}}'' and ''{{ai|Ki Burst|Riven}}''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: During this time, '''Riven''' can cast ''{{ai|Wind Slash|Riven}}''.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Riven''' empowers her blade for 15 seconds, gaining {{as|25% AD}} {{sti|ad|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}}, {{sti|range|75 '''bonus''' attack range}}, and increased range on ''{{ai|Broken Wings|Riven}}'' and ''{{ai|Ki Burst|Riven}}''.

After {{fd|0.5}} seconds, she can cast ''{{ai|Wind Slash|Riven}}'' within the duration.
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* All bonuses are gained after {{fd|0.5}} seconds of the ability starting its cast.
** The {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} amount is factored upon cast, and does not change.
* If '''Riven''' has a basic attack buffered before the end of ''Blade of the Exile's'' cast time, the buffered basic attack will start {{fd|0.33}} seconds after the end of the cast time.
** The delay will not apply to basic attack commands input after ''Blade of the Exile's'' cast time.
